headline: DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) Beats Q1 Earnings Forecasts, But Guidance and Revenue Miss Fuel After-Hours Drop
summary: DexCom beats Q1 earnings forecasts but revenue misses estimates, causing a 6% after-hours drop. Full-year guidance reaffirmed, not raised, fueling caution.

raw.headline: DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) Beats Q1 Earnings Forecasts, But Guidance and Revenue Miss Fuel After-Hours Drop
raw.summary: DexCom beats Q1 earnings forecasts but revenue misses estimates, causing a 6% after-hours drop. Full-year guidance reaffirmed, not raised, fueling caution.

headline: DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations But Stock Drops
summary: Medical device company DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 15% year on year to $1.19 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $5.21 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.56 per share was 19% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: DexCom Q1 Adj. EPS $0.56 Beats $0.47 Estimate, Sales $1.191B Beat $1.175B Estimate
summary: DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) reported quarterly earnings of $0.56 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $0.47 by 19.15 percent. This is a 75 percent increase over earnings of $0.32 per share from the same period
